---
title: "Assignment 2"
---

# Assignment 2

This assignment explores a small dataset and produces a simple visualization.

## (a) Summary of a Dataset

We calculate summary statistics for the built-in `cars` dataset.

```{r}
summary(cars)
```

The summary function gives basic statistics such as minimum, maximum, mean and quartiles.

## (b) Histogram

Now we visualize the distribution of car speeds.

```{r}
hist(cars$speed)
```

The histogram shows how the car speeds are distributed in the dataset.
